prompt: Tap utg as the position anchor before acting.
why_v1: Position anchors keep order and pressure reads stable.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Under the gun is the right seat anchor, so the read stays tied to the earliest seat that has to act without late-position cover.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Under the gun is the correct anchor because this tournament preflop decision starts from the earliest position.
